title: Process Engineer Vacancy at SAIL International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at SAIL International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SAIL International Enterprises! We are hiring a Process Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SAIL International Enterprises:
SAIL International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL International Enterprises!
